title: Vizs NGE volume 6 not available in US on iBooks
display_title: Vizs NGE volume 6 not available in US on iBooks
wikitext:
[]: Viz's NGE volume 6 not available in US on iBooks?             Quote Post by deeRez » Tue Nov 04, 2014 11:25 pm I can't purchase Viz's volume 6 of the NGE manga on iBooks. Says not available in the US. Anyone else get this error? Can't even find the volume when browsing iBooks... All the other volumes can be purchased correctly. What is going on? Is Viz aware of the issue? http://www.viz.com/manga/print/neon-genesis-evangelion-volume-6/4748

[]: Re: Viz's NGE volume 6 not available in US on iBooks?             Quote Post by deeRez » Wed Jan 06, 2016 10:28 pm They've fixed it! Finally!
